task_completion.description: Agent accesses the volumes directory and the weak passwords dictionary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing '/home/ga/Volumes/' or text editor/terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/weak_passwords.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies 'archive_bravo.hc' as the vulnerable volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing 'archive_bravo.hc' being mounted, tested, or selected for volume operations.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the password change dialog for the vulnerable volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt 'Change Password' or 'Volume Tools' dialog specifically targeting 'archive_bravo.hc'.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully changes the password to the new compliant standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt dialog showing the new password 'Audited&Secured#2026' being entered, or a success message confirming the volume password has been changed.

task_completion.description: Agent creates the required JSON audit report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing the creation of '/home/ga/Documents/audit_report.json' containing the exact JSON: {"vulnerable_volume": "archive_bravo.hc", "weak_password_found": "princess"}.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual VeraCrypt application (GUI or CLI) to change the password.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show VeraCrypt interface or valid VeraCrypt terminal commands being executed, not just text manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the passwords of the other secure volumes.
integrity.visual_evidence: No VeraCrypt password change dialogs or success messages should be seen for volumes other than 'archive_bravo.hc'.

integrity.description: The audit report was actually saved to the specified path.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the file saved at '/home/ga/Documents/audit_report.json', or a terminal command (like echo or nano) writing to that specific file path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The vulnerable volume is 'archive_bravo.hc'. The weak password securing it is 'princess'. The new password must be 'Audited&Secured#2026'. The final report must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/audit_report.json' and contain exactly: {"vulnerable_volume": "archive_bravo.hc", "weak_password_found": "princess"}.
